2026-W19.title: Figure AI humanoids were retired from BMW after 11 months of weekday operation
2026-W19.summary_text: A LinkedIn post reviewing Figure AI's BMW deployment says the humanoids were retired after 11 months of weekday operation, with 50% uptime cited alongside output claims tied to more than 30,000 cars and over 90,000 handled sheet-metal parts. The more useful angle is not the headline deployment itself but the operating math: time on site does not automatically translate into a breakthrough if utilization and per-robot contribution still look modest.
